executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_new repository on main branch. The build has failed 3 times consecutively (attempts 1-3) with the latest failure at action run 22730480809. Based on the Spring Boot Maven project structure analysis, the primary build errors are related to missing @Builder annotations in DTO classes, causing compilation failures when builder pattern is used in test classes and service implementations.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in ApplyCouponRequest DTO
errors.description: The ApplyCouponRequest.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but the test classes (CartCouponControllerTest.java, CartCouponServiceImplTest.java) are attempting to use ApplyCouponRequest.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure preventing successful build. All test classes and service implementations using ApplyCouponRequest.builder() will fail to compile.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in CartItem DTO
errors.description: The CartItem.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but service implementations (CartServiceImpl.java) are attempting to use CartItem.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure in CartServiceImpl.toCartItem() method preventing successful build.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in CartResponse DTO
errors.description: The CartResponse.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but service implementations and test classes are attempting to use CartResponse.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure in CartServiceImpl.toCartResponse() and multiple test classes preventing successful build.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in ErrorDetail DTO
errors.description: The ErrorDetail.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but GlobalExceptionHandler.java is attempting to use ErrorDetail.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure in GlobalExceptionHandler preventing successful build.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in ErrorResponse DTO
errors.description: The ErrorResponse.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but GlobalExceptionHandler.java is attempting to use ErrorResponse.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure in GlobalExceptionHandler preventing successful build.

errors.title: Missing @Builder annotation in ValidateCouponRequest DTO
errors.description: The ValidateCouponRequest.java class in code/ directory is missing the @Builder annotation, but test classes are attempting to use ValidateCouponRequest.builder() pattern.
errors.root_cause: Duplicate DTO files exist - one in root code/ directory without @Builder annotation, and one in proper package structure with @Builder. Maven compilation is picking up the incorrect version from root directory.
errors.impact: Compilation failure in CouponControllerTest preventing successful build.

errors.title: Incorrect Maven project structure
errors.description: DTO files are placed in the root code/ directory instead of the proper Maven src/main/java package structure. This causes Maven to compile the wrong versions of the classes.
errors.error_message: Source files found outside standard Maven directory structure
errors.root_cause: Project files were incorrectly placed in root code/ directory instead of following Maven's standard directory layout (src/main/java/com/myproject/models/dtos/).
errors.impact: Maven compiler picks up incorrect source files, leading to compilation failures across the entire project.
